ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item available */,
  "esdtype" TEXT /* Electronic software distribution type (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "seller_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes from the seller about the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation error */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item associated with the error */,
  "response_message" TEXT /* Message returned for the error */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "possible_cause" TEXT /* Possible causes of the error */,
  "error_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the error (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., syntax, logical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_errors_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_descriptions" (
  "error_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each kind of error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the error */,
  "resolution_steps" TEXT /* Steps to resolve the error */,
  "error_category" TEXT /* Category of the error (e.g., data, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_solutions" (
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solution */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code associated with the solution */,
  "solution_description" TEXT /* Description of the solution */,
  "solution_example" TEXT /* Example of the solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item associated with the error */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the validation error */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the error was logged */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_log_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., seller, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item submitted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the item */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was submitted */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_submissions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_validation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation status record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being validated */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Current validation status (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was last checked */,
  "next_check_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status will be checked next */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_validation_status_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seller_profiles" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "seller_description" TEXT /* Description of the seller */,
  "seller_rating" REAL /* Rating of the seller (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seller_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seller being reviewed */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buyer who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_rating" REAL /* Rating given in the review (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buyer_reviews_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buyer_reviews_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES seller_profiles ("seller_id")
)
